summary: Activity Feed revamp testing complete. All backend tests pass (9/9). Frontend features verified: absolute timestamps display correctly (Yesterday at 10:04 PM), 5 events shown initially with 'Show All X Events' button, expand/collapse works on events (chevron icons), fallback titles for null events (Email Sent, Sent SMS, Personal SMS), View Conversation navigates to thread page with correct contact params.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing contact (ID: 69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1) with 28 events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Feed revamp verified. Features tested: 1) formatEventTime() function uses date-fns format() with absolute dates - 'h:mm a' for today, 'Yesterday at h:mm a', 'MMM d at h:mm a' for current year, 'MMM d, yyyy at h:mm a' for older. 2) INITIAL_EVENT_COUNT=5 with showAllEvents state toggle. 3) expandedEvents state tracks which events are expanded. 4) EVENT_TYPE_LABELS provides fallback titles for null titles. 5) View Conversation passes contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email as URL params via router.push(). Backend API /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events returns events sorted by timestamp descending.

activity_feed_timestamps.absolute_format_older: MMM d, yyyy at h:mm a
